facebook.caption:
POV: you walk past a staircase on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and almost keep going.

Don't.

Zyzu Kafé is up those stairs. 4.4 stars across 333 reviews. In Duong Dong, that means something.

Order something cold. Sit down. Stop rushing.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Stairs on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Most tourists walk right past them. 333 reviews later, locals know exactly where they lead. Zyzu Kafé is worth the climb.

instagram.caption:
Walked past these stairs twice. Third time I went up. Zyzu Kafé. 4.4★, 333 reviews. Worth every step.

Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: A staircase most people skip. 333 reviews say that's a mistake. Zyzu Kafé, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.
